description: Held-out evaluation set for SEAL-DSA. These questions should NOT be used during training.

arrays_strings: Implement Kadane's algorithm for maximum subarray sum.
Given a sorted array, remove duplicates in-place and return the new length.
Find the longest substring without repeating characters.
linked_lists: Merge K sorted linked lists into one sorted list.
Remove the Nth node from the end of a linked list in one pass.
Determine if a linked list is a palindrome.
stacks_queues: Implement a circular queue with fixed capacity.
Find the largest rectangle in a histogram using a stack.
Design a stack that supports increment operations on bottom K elements.
trees: Convert a sorted array to a balanced BST.
Find all root-to-leaf paths that sum to a target value.
Construct a binary tree from inorder and preorder traversals.
graphs: Find the number of islands in a 2D grid.
Determine if a graph is bipartite.
Find the shortest path in a weighted graph using Bellman-Ford.
sorting_searching: Find the Kth largest element in an unsorted array.
Search for a target in a rotated sorted array.
Implement counting sort and explain when it is preferred.
dynamic_programming: Find the minimum edit distance between two strings.
Solve the coin change problem: minimum coins to make a target.
Find the length of the longest increasing subsequence.
